method: §2 scatter: HSV color mask + CC centroid, integer-x snap; trend line traced from black mask after dilated marker subtraction, per-column median row, linear fit, endpoints at visible mask extent.
phase4_evidence: Trend line endpoints (12.959, 0.003) → (30.070, 0.692) vs ground truth (12.903, 0.0064) → (30.069, 0.7057). No legend rendered (original has none).
